results.rendered_html:
anīkinī (von anīka) f.
1〉 Heer  AK. 2,8,2,46 .  H. 745 .  MED. n. 162 .
— 2〉 der 10te Theil eines vollständigen Heeres (akṣauhiṇī) oder 3 Camū, d. i. 10955 Fusssoldaten, 6561 Pferde, 2187 Elephanten und ebenso viele Wagen,  AK. 2,8,2,49 .  H. 749 .  MED. n. 162 .

results.rendered_html:
anīkinī [anīkānāṃ saṃghaḥ; anīkaṃ yuddhaṃ prayojanatayā astyasyāḥ iti vā, anīka-ini]
(pb)
1 An army, host, forces.
2 Three chamūs or one-tenth of a complete army (akṣauhiṇī); 10935 foot, 6561 horse, 2187 elephants and as many chariots.
3 A lotus.
